requirements.summary: Update the Instagram social media link in the Footer component to use the URL https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/
acceptanceCriteria: The Instagram icon in the Footer links to https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/
The link opens in a new tab with appropriate security attributes

file_operations.description: Update the Instagram social media link href attribute to https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/ and ensure the link includes target="_blank" and rel="noopener noreferrer" for security

requirements.summary: Update the Instagram social media link in the Contact page to use the URL https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/
acceptanceCriteria: The Instagram icon in the Contact page links to https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/
The link opens in a new tab with appropriate security attributes
